nasb.text: He may beat him forty times but no more, so that he does not beat him with many more stripes than these and your brother is not degraded in your eyes.

esv.text: Forty stripes may be given him, but not more, lest, if one should go on to beat him with more stripes than these, your brother be degraded in your sight.

cnv.text: 只可打他四十下，不可再多；恐怕你多打了他，過了這數目，你的兄弟就在你眼前受辱了。

ccb.text: 最多可以鞭打他四十下。如果超过四十下，你们就是在公开羞辱自己的同胞。
